name: sha-guard
prediction: SHA-shaped tokens the model writes into plan notes/summary are verified against git (cat-file -e, fail-open): fabricated commit hashes draw an immediate correction steer instead of surviving as false provenance. Pass rate neutral; sha-guard telemetry measures the failure mode's real frequency — if missing stays 0 across rounds, the guard documents a non-problem and should be dropped (reddit checkpointed-development port, 2026-07-21).
